description: Keep the session-recall index fresh — incremental re-index in the background at session start.

hooks.command: pgrep -f 'session-recall index' >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v session-recall >/dev/null 2>&1 && (session-recall index >/tmp/session-recall-index.log 2>&1 &) || echo 'session-recall: CLI not on PATH - index not refreshed (see README: Keeping the index fresh)' >>/tmp/session-recall-index.log; }
